title: zelkova carpinifolia
intro: Zelkova carpinifolia, also known as Chinese elm, is a deciduous tree native to Asia that belongs to the elm family (Ulmaceae). Traditionally, the plant is used in Chinese medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Zelkova carpinifolia include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Zelkova carpinifolia include tea, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
